subcodes.first_line: O my loving Lord, my sheltering Refuge! Thou beholdest Thy servants who stand firm in Thy Cause [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ربی الحنون و کهفی المصون تری عبادک المستقیمین علی امرک
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for protection, @suffering and imprisonment, @petitions to authorities, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @war and peace
